title: Mission Proposal & Approval
description: The agent proposes a mission to the Person Server: a markdown description of what it intends to accomplish, plus a list of tools it will use. The PS approves and returns an AAuth-Mission header containing the approver URL and an s256 (SHA-256 hash of the mission blob).

mission_blob.title: Approved Mission Blob
mission_blob.description: Mission proposal approved by the Person Server.
mission_blob.markdown:
# Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

tools.name: ReportWriter
tools.description: Write the summary report to the shared drive

s256_chain.label: Mission Proposal Body
s256_chain.detail: The agent computes the canonical mission blob bytes that will be approved.

s256_chain.label: AAuth-Mission Header
s256_chain.detail: The PS returns approver and s256 so later requests can reference the exact mission blob.

s256_chain.label: Client Verification
s256_chain.detail: The agent recomputes SHA-256 over the returned blob bytes and confirms the value matches.

steps.label: Discover PS metadata
annotations: Agent discovers the PS's mission_endpoint from well-known metadata.
mission_endpoint is where the agent POSTs mission proposals.

steps.label: POST mission proposal to /mission

request_body.description:
# Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

tools.name: ReportWriter
tools.description: Write the summary report to the shared drive

response_body.description:
# Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

tools.name: ReportWriter
tools.description: Write the summary report to the shared drive

annotations: Agent sends mission description (Markdown) + tool list.
PS approves and responds with body = mission blob + AAuth-Mission header.
Agent must store this s256 and present it in future requests as AAuth-Mission.
Request AAuth-Capabilities advertises agent support; response capabilities reflect the PS-approved set.

steps.label: Verify s256 matches blob
annotations: Agent verifies: SHA-256(response body bytes) == s256 from AAuth-Mission header.
This binds the mission text to an immutable fingerprint.
Agent caches: approver URL + s256 for use in resource requests.
